creator: goran.lowkrantz@hidden-powers.com
text:
--On 28 May 2014 21:40:08 +0000 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of www/piwigo,
>
> Please note that PR ports/190353 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/190353
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

This was fixed in ports/187484 that both upgraded to 2.6.1 and added 
staging support.

/glz

"With sufficient thrust, pigs fly just fine. However, this is not
necessarily a good idea. It is hard to be sure where they are going to
land, and it could be dangerous sitting under them as they fly
overhead." (RFC 1925 Truth 3)
